name: PROCTER & GAMBLE Co
sic_description: Soap, Detergents, Cleang Preparations, Perfumes, Cosmetics
summary: Procter & Gamble is a multinational consumer goods company selling branded daily-use products in approximately 180 countries. Its portfolio spans beauty, grooming, health care, fabric care, home care, and baby/family care categories. Products are sold through mass merchandisers, grocery stores, e-commerce, club stores, drug stores, and direct-to-consumer channels. Walmart accounts for approximately 16% of total sales.
